positive: A central, ornate tapestry design featuring a mythical bioluminescent celestial fox curled around oversized, stylized cosmic flora. The motif should be executed in a highly detailed Art Nouveau style, blending delicate botanical elements (lily pads, ferns, scrolling vines) with deep space nebula patterns and constellations. Use a limited, high-contrast palette: deep indigo, glowing cyan, electric teal, and vibrant gold highlights against a deep black background. The composition must be perfectly symmetrical and centered, creating a strong, repeating silhouette ideal for screen printing on apparel. Clean lines, glowing ethereal quality, perfect for textile printing.
negative: lowres, blurry, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, mutated, text, signature, watermark, copyright, logo, messy, distracting, amateur, muted colors
